# Getting Started

Welcome to the project! This page walks you through the initial setup.

## Prerequisites

- Go 1.26 or later
- tesseract (for OCR)
- pdftoppm (for PDF rendering)

## Installation

```bash
go install github.com/danieljustus/symaira-ingest/cmd/symingest@latest
```

## Next Steps

- Read the [[API Reference]] for the full API surface.
- Check out [[Project Notes]] for an overview.
